Abu Dhabi (UAE).name: 🕌 Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque

Amman (Jordan).name: 🎭 Roman Theatre

Amman (Jordan).name: 🛍️ Rainbow Street

Ankara (Turkey).name: 🏛️ Anitkabir

Ashgabat (Turkmenistan).name: 🏛️ Monument of Neutrality

Ashgabat (Turkmenistan).desc: The central square flanked by opulent white-marble palaces and monuments.

Astana (Kazakhstan).name: 🗼 Bayterek Tower

Baghdad (Iraq).name: ⚔️ Al-Shaheed Monument

Baghdad (Iraq).name: 📚 Al-Mutanabbi Street
Baghdad (Iraq).desc: The historic heart of Baghdad's literary and intellectual life, packed with bookstalls.

Baghdad (Iraq).name: 🏺 National Museum of Iraq

Baku (Azerbaijan).name: 🔥 Flame Towers

Baku (Azerbaijan).name: 〰️ Heydar Aliyev Center
Baku (Azerbaijan).desc: A modern architectural masterpiece designed by Zaha Hadid, famous for its flowing, curved lines.

Bandar Seri Begawan (Brunei).name: 🕌 Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque

Bandar Seri Begawan (Brunei).name: 👑 Istana Nurul Iman
Bandar Seri Begawan (Brunei).desc: The official residence of the Sultan, recognized as one of the world's largest residential palaces.

Bangkok (Thailand).name: 🛕 The Grand Palace
Bangkok (Thailand).desc: A spectacular complex of buildings that has served as the official royal residence since 1782.

Bangkok (Thailand).name: 🕌 Wat Arun

Bangkok (Thailand).name: 🛍️ Chatuchak Weekend Market

Beijing (China).name: 🏰 The Forbidden City

Beijing (China).name: 🧱 Great Wall of China (Badaling/Mutianyu)
Beijing (China).desc: The iconic ancient defensive structure snaking along mountains outside the city center.

Beirut (Lebanon).name: 🌊 Pigeon Rocks (Raouche)

Beirut (Lebanon).name: 🏛️ Mohammad Al-Amin Mosque

Bishkek (Kyrgyzstan).name: 🏛️ Ala-Too Square

Damascus (Syria).name: 🕌 Umayyad Mosque

Dhaka (Bangladesh).name: 🏰 Lalbagh Fort

Dhaka (Bangladesh).name: 🏛️ Ahsan Manzil

Dhaka (Bangladesh).name: 🚢 Sadarghat

Dili (Timor-Leste).name: 🗽 Cristo Rei of Dili

Doha (Qatar).name: 🎨 Museum of Islamic Art

Doha (Qatar).name: 🛍️ Souq Waqif
Doha (Qatar).desc: A traditional market selling garments, spices, handicrafts, and host to excellent restaurants.

Doha (Qatar).name: 🌊 The Pearl-Qatar

Dubai (UAE).name: 🏙️ Burj Khalifa

Dushanbe (Tajikistan).name: 🏛️ Kohi Navruz

Dushanbe (Tajikistan).desc: Housed under a large dome, it details the region's ancient and medieval history.

Hanoi (Vietnam).name: 🌊 Hoan Kiem Lake

Islamabad (Pakistan).name: 🕌 Faisal Mosque

Jakarta (Indonesia).name: 🗼 National Monument (Monas)

Kabul (Afghanistan).name: 🌳 Gardens of Babur

Kathmandu (Nepal).name: 🏛️ Kathmandu Durbar Square

Manama (Bahrain).name: ¼🕌 Al Fateh Grand Mosque

Taipei (Taiwan).name: 🏙️ Taipei 101

Thimphu (Bhutan).name: 🧱 Tashichho Dzong

Tokyo (Japan).name: 🗼 Tokyo Tower

Tokyo (Japan).name: ⛩️ Senso-ji Temple

Tokyo (Japan).name: 🚶 Shibuya Crossing

Ulaanbaatar (Mongolia).name: 🏛️ Sukhbaatar Square

Ulaanbaatar (Mongolia).name: 🛕 Gandantegchinlen Monastery

Vientiane (Laos).name: 🛕 Pha That Luang

Yerevan (Armenia).name: 🎨 Yerevan Cascade
